title: dalea cora
intro: Dalea cora, also known as the Coral Honeysuckle Vine or Coral Honeysuckle, is a perennial vine native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the pea family. The medicinal properties of Dalea cora lie in its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Dalea cora can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support immune function, alleviate digestive issues, and promote overall well-being.
